series_metadata.series_title: Dangerous Wild Animal or Restricted Snake Relinquishment Form
series_metadata.series_description: Form used to voluntarily surrender ownership of dangerous wild animal or restricted snake to Ohio Department of Agriculture.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned and verified as readable. ; Electronic: Retain for 1 year after animal or snake is no longer in ODA possession., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
